posts.author: chrisl (Chris Lubarski)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if monday docs would be able to function a little more like onenote. A few feature enhancements I think would be very helpful in organizing my notes.

  • The ability to collapse and expand based on the header size (H1, H2, H3, etc.)
  • The ability to add a page or tab to a document, further organizing sections or subproject notes.

Thanks!
